label: FAIL
rationale: Target reports SUCCESS for host Set of SPInfo column 0 (UID). Core SPInfo defines column 0 as UID and section 5.3.2.1.1 says UID SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host; Opal preconfigures the SPInfo row at UID 0000000200000001.
